name: incident-desk
description: Testing plugin for incident triage, operator handoffs, and response checklists.

interface.shortDescription: Triage an incident and shape the next operator steps
interface.longDescription: Use Incident Desk to summarize active issues, capture impact, and produce a short incident response checklist for a teammate or on-call handoff.
defaultPrompt: Summarize this incident and list the next operator actions.
Turn these logs and notes into an incident handoff.
Draft a response checklist for this outage.
